cleanrooms.collaboration.CreatorDisplayN.Description: A display name of the collaboration creator.

cleanrooms.collaboration.CreatorMemberAb.Description: The abilities granted to the collaboration creator.

cleanrooms.collaboration.DataEncryptionM.Description: The settings for client-side encryption for cryptographic computing.

cleanrooms.collaboration.Description.Description: A description of the collaboration provided by the collaboration owner.

cleanrooms.collaboration.Members.Description: A list of initial members, not including the creator. This list is immutable.

cleanrooms.collaboration.Name.Description: A human-readable identifier provided by the collaboration owner. Display names are not unique.

cleanrooms.collaboration.QueryLogStatus.Description: An indicator as to whether query logging has been enabled or disabled for the collaboration.

cleanrooms.collaboration.Tags.Description: An optional label that you can assign to a resource when you create it. Each tag consists of a key and an optional value, both of which you define. When you use tagging, you can also use tag-based access control in IAM policies to control access to this resource.
